active_subtitle: Quickly activate Personal Intelligence with the guided wizard.
use_buckyos_sn: All traffic is encrypted and forwarded through SN relay service.
bucky_forward_desc: Route encrypted traffic to your PI device through the BuckyOS SN Web3 bridge.
bucky_forward_benefit1: A simple setup lets your PI work in standard browsers.
bucky_forward_benefit2: Access performance depends on the available bandwidth of the SN relay service.
direct_connect_desc: Public access will reach your PI device without relay.
direct_connect_warning: Please confirm that your network environment meets the following conditions (if you do not fully understand these options, do not select this item):
direct_connect_condition1: My router has a public IPv4 address after dial-up
direct_connect_condition2: I have mapped router ports 80 and 443 to ports 80 and 443 on this PI device
direct_connect_condition3: This PI device runs on a VPS with a fixed IP, so no router setup is needed
port_mapping_full: I have mapped ports 443 and 2980 to this device, or this device has a public IPv6 address
port_mapping_rtcp_only: I can only map port 2980 (or other) to this device
port_mapping_full_hint: All traffic will reach this device directly without going through SN relay
port_mapping_rtcp_only_hint:
Browser traffic will go through SN relay
RTCP traffic from clients can reach this device directly
For example, traffic from buckyos desktop on another laptop can access this device directly without SN relay.
public_ip_option: This device has a fixed public IP
public_ip_desc: Usually for VPS deployments; traffic does not go through SN relay.
public_ip_hint: Make sure ports 80, 443, and 2980 on this device are publicly reachable.
vps_mode_desc: This PI device runs on a VPS with a fixed IP, so no router setup is needed (not supported yet)
custom_sn_placeholder: If not using buckyos default SN, please enter custom SN URL
custom_sn_helper: Leave empty to use the default buckyos SN; advanced users can point to a custom SN gateway.
title_step_2: 2. Set up access routing for your PI device
domain_based_name: Domain based on your name, cannot be modified after creation!
domain_access_desc: After activation, you will access your Personal Intelligence through the domain below
invite_code_required: During Beta testing, an invitation code is required to use the web3.buckyos.ai subdomain service:
domain_placeholder: Enter the domain to be used
domain_provider_setup: Complete the following settings with your domain provider:
dns_ns_record_desc: SN will handle A record resolution correctly and return the right IP address based on this PI device's connectivity
dns_txt_records_title: SN will automatically create the required TXT records for your domain:
dns_a_record: Set A record: Set to your Personal AI Server's public IP
dns_txt_record: Set TXT record: Add TXT record for your domain, value is:
create_sn_user_intro: Create your SN (BNS) account first, then continue with this device's access settings and system permissions.
create_sn_user_desc: Start by creating a new SN (BNS) account.
create_or_login_sn_user_title: Create or sign in to your SN (BNS) account
create_or_login_sn_user_desc: In step one, the wizard will automatically check whether the username already exists: it will register a new account if not, or sign in and bind the owner key if it does.
login_existing_sn_account_hint: This entry is reserved for now and is not implemented in the current version.
wallet_bound_username: This wallet is already bound to an SN (BNS) account.
domain_username_locked: The SN (BNS) account was created in step one. This page only shows the final access domain.
title_step_3: 3. Set up the domain for Personal Intelligence
friend_code_desc: After setting friend access code, you can access "friend visible content" with the access code
friend_code_placeholder: Feature not implemented yet, can be set arbitrarily
guest_mode_desc: After enabling guest mode, anyone can access your public content
ai_provider_description: Connect common AI model services. Custom AI Model Providers and local LLMs can be configured later in the AICC control panel.
ai_provider_tutorial_link: How to get an AI API token
ai_provider_sn_included: Your SN account already has the LLM Router service enabled.
ai_provider_sn_section_desc: If you already have an SN service plan, enter the Active Code to enable automatic provider setup.
ai_provider_skip_body: If skipped, system AI features will remain unavailable.
jarvis_msg_tunnel_description: Configure Agent Jarvis Msg-Tunnel. (Only Telegram Tunnel is supported for now; more options will be added later.)
jarvis_bot_token_tutorial_link: How to get Telegram Bot API Token
jarvis_account_id_tutorial_link: How to get Telegram Account ID
jarvis_account_id_inline_link: How to get Telegram Account ID
jarvis_telegram_card_desc: This wizard currently offers a quick Telegram Tunnel setup only.
jarvis_msg_tunnel_footer_note: This wizard currently provides Telegram Tunnel quick setup only. Full configuration remains available in the control panel.
error_telegram_tunnel_incomplete: Please fill in both Telegram Bot API Token and Telegram Account ID, or clear both fields to skip this step.
access_method_direct: Access route: Direct connection to your Personal Intelligence
access_method_bridge: Access method: Use buckyos.ai's Web3 bridge
private_key_warning1: Please keep the following private key safe, it cannot be viewed after activation!
private_key_warning2: !!!If the private key is lost, it cannot be recovered and irreparable loss may result. Keep it safe.!!!
private_key_warning3: !!!If the private key is leaked, data or assets may be lost. Never send it to others, and store it offline whenever possible.!!!
activation_success_desc: Your Personal Intelligence has been successfully activated
refresh_note: Activation is still completing. It should be ready in about {{time}}. If the page shows errors, refresh a few more times.
error_password_mismatch: The two passwords entered do not match
error_password_too_short: Password length cannot be less than 8
error_friend_code_too_short: Friend access code length cannot be less than 6
error_name_too_short: Name length must be greater than 6
error_invite_code_too_short: Invitation code length must be greater than 8 characters
error_invalid_port: Invalid port number, please enter a number between 1-65535
error_private_key_not_ready: Private key not ready yet, please wait
error_generate_txt_records_failed: Failed to generate TXT records, please try again
error_copy_failed: Copy failed. Please copy it manually.
dns_config_txt_tips: Please add the following 3 TXT records to your domain before activation
